raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (instruction adherence), shows where the draft drifts from it (by comparing the thesis and results), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast (suggesting either narrowing or dropping the 'first' claim).",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (INSTRUCTSCORE) and articulates the delta (different focus on instruction adherence).",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ('first systematic evaluation of instruction adherence in MT').",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (three language pairs instead of a broader set).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (recommending deployment without addressing production blockers like latency, cost, and hallucination rate on out-of-domain input).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.6,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (instruction adherence), shows where the draft drifts from it (by comparing the thesis and results), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast (suggesting either narrowing or dropping the 'first' claim).
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (INSTRUCTSCORE) and articulates the delta (different focus on instruction adherence).
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ('first systematic evaluation of instruction adherence in MT').
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (three language pairs instead of a broader set).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (recommending deployment without addressing production blockers like latency, cost, and hallucination rate on out-of-domain input).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
